---
title: "Compare Jurisdictions"
subtitle: "Artificial legal personhood — where the world stands"
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Only **Argentina** carries a verified, sourced case study so far. Other columns are Observatory
monitoring placeholders and will populate as records are verified.
:::

| | **Argentina** | **Brazil** | **European Union** | **United States** |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Formal legal-personhood proposal for AI-operated entities | **Yes** — 2026 executive bill: *sociedad automatizada* and *corporación no humana* | None identified — general AI regulatory framework under congressional debate | None active — a 2017 European Parliament resolution floated "electronic personhood"; shelved after expert opposition | None at federal level — scholarship debates whether existing LLC statutes could already host algorithm-operated entities |
| Liability answer | Entity answers with its own assets | — | — | — |
| Traceability / registry | Mandatory disclosure of ultimate beneficial owners | — | — | — |
| Observatory record | [case-0001](../../observatory/argentina/case-studies/argentina-sociedades-automatizadas.md) | [folder](../../observatory/brazil/timeline.md) | [folder](../../observatory/european-union/timeline.md) | [folder](../../observatory/united-states/timeline.md) |
| Status | **Verified case study** | Monitoring | Monitoring | Monitoring |

*Concepts engaged across every jurisdiction: [Registry](../../core/concepts/artificial-registry.md) ·
[Liability](../../core/concepts/liability.md) · [Governance](../../core/concepts/governance.md) ·
[Audit](../../core/concepts/audit.md).*
